info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Account Registration API
info.description: The Account Registration API allows users to create new accounts within the system. This endpoint facilitates the onboarding process by collecting essential user information and establishing secure accounts. Typical consumers include end-users looking to register for services and third-party applications that require account management capabilities. Through this API, developers can streamline user registration, enhance user experience, and manage account lifecycle efficiently.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new account by providing necessary account details. Ensure that all mandatory fields are filled correctly to successfully create an account.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new account. It requires the necessary account details to be provided in JSON format.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

200.description: Request completed successfully with the account details.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: ErrorResponse

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful.

message.description: General message related to the error.
message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: Stack trace information for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion on how to resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema representing a generic error response for the operation.

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while creating account details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.title: Error Details

customerId.description: The ID of the customer associated with the error.

errorCode.description: A specific code representing the type of error.

message.description: A message providing further details about the error.
message.example: Account with the specified ID does not exist.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.description: This schema provides additional information about the error that occurred.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Error Response for Account Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the error occurrence.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A brief message categorizing the error.

message.description: A detailed message explaining the error.
message.example: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

path.description: The path of the endpoint that triggered the error.

trace.description: A stack trace or additional details about the failure, if applicable.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the error.
suggestion.example: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the structure of an error response returned when an account operation fails with a 404 status code.

example.message: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

details.message: No active account exists for the requested customer.

example.suggestion: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Request

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer.

accountType.description: The type of account to be created, such as savings or checking.

currency.description: The currency in which the account will be denominated.

initialDeposit.description: The initial deposit amount required to open the account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema for creating a new account. This includes basic information about the customer and the account details.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Operations Response

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the account.

accountType.description: Type of the account (e.g., savings, checking).

status.description: Current status of the account (e.g., active, inactive).

currency.description: Currency in which the account balance is maintained.

message.description: Additional message regarding the account operation, typically for status or error messages.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Response schema for the account creation operation, containing account details and status information.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
